infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Rivet to use your location for field tracking while Today is open and to enable Tap to Pay and nearby card readers.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Allow Rivet to connect to Stripe Terminal card readers.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Allow Rivet to connect to Stripe Terminal card readers.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Allow Rivet to discover Stripe Terminal readers on your network.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Allow Rivet to send push notifications for approvals, job updates, and the end-of-day digest.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Rivet to use the microphone to capture voice actions and field voice notes.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Rivet to use the camera to take job photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Rivet to use your location for field tracking while Today is open and to enable Tap to Pay and nearby card readers.
Allow Rivet to use your location to enable Tap to Pay and card readers.
plugins.bluetoothPeripheralPermission: Allow Rivet to connect to Stripe Terminal card readers.
plugins.bluetoothAlwaysUsagePermission: Allow Rivet to connect to Stripe Terminal card readers.
plugins.localNetworkUsagePermission: Allow Rivet to discover Stripe Terminal readers on your network.
